title: In a Christian Churchyard
content:
This field of stones, he said,
    May well call forth a sigh;
    Beneath them lie the dead,
    On them the living lie.
meaning:
This evocative piece by James Thomson -  (Bysshe Vanolis) represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance, inviting the reader to reflect on the deeper themes of human experience and artistic expression.
